description_long: This object is a single inline roller skate, designed for urban use and featuring a robust, high-ankle boot for support. The boot is primarily black with white and beige accents, and it includes a prominent white strap and buckle system for secure fastening. The skate has four visible wheels arranged in a straight line, mounted on a white frame with the brand name 'AIRWALK' printed in bold black letters. The wheels show signs of wear, indicating use on outdoor surfaces. The boot's exterior appears to be made of a combination of hard plastic and synthetic materials, with reinforced areas for durability and comfort. The overall design is functional and sporty, suitable for aggressive or recreational skating in city environments.
description: A black and white inline roller skate with four wheels, a high-ankle boot, and a secure strap and buckle system. The skate features the 'AIRWALK' brand and is built for urban use.
description_view_0: Side view showing the 'AIRWALK' branding, four wheels, and the detailed strap and buckle system on the boot.
description_view_1: Top-down view highlighting the alignment of the four wheels and the narrow profile of the skate.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the wheel frame, boot contours, and fastening strap from a different angle.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the heel, back of the boot, and the arrangement of the wheels.
attribute_roller_skates: Inline skates with four wheels in a single row, black and white color scheme, prominent white strap and buckle, 'AIRWALK' branding, and reinforced high-ankle boot.
attribute_clothing_style: Not applicable; only the roller skate is present, with no visible clothing on a figure.
attribute_pose: Not applicable; only the roller skate is present, with no visible figure or pose.
